properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sometimes problems seem so big They hide the light of day Sometimes pain cuts so deep I can't find the words to pray Sometimes heartaches seem to be Much more than I can stand That's when grace seems To take me by the hand

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He gives grace in the midst of every storm God gives grace that carries the weary and worn He's everything we ever need for everything we face So remember when it seems you can't go on God gives grace

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I know every pain I feel Becomes his very own God knows the weakness of my heart That I can't make it all alone For He knows what I can handle And He never gives me more When my strength comes to its end He has more grace in store

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Grace will help you stand when problems seems at all And grace will pick you up every time you fall
